problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) — specifically Two-dimensional material stacking — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
